recommendations.director: Ken Daurio, Boris Jacq, Frank Baradat, Bruno Dequier, Bruno Chauffard, Cinco Paul, Habib Louati, Matthew Nealon, Benjamin Le Ster, Guy Bar'ely, Eric Favela, Thierry Noblet, Régis Schuller, Yarrow Cheney, Derek Drymon, Glenn McCoy, Kyle Balda

recommendations.title: Panic in the Mailroom
recommendations.overview: Two Minions are busy at work in the mailroom. One of them, bored, decides to throw a box of expired PX-41 samples into its designated chute.

recommendations.title: Cro Minion
recommendations.overview: Two minions have to babysit a little Neanderthal baby.

recommendations.title: Minions: The Rise of Gru
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Action
recommendations.overview: A fanboy of a supervillain supergroup known as the Vicious 6, Gru hatches a plan to become evil enough to join them, with the backup of his followers, the Minions.

recommendations.title: Banana
recommendations.overview: The Minions fight over a delicious banana... but is that all they want?!

recommendations.title: Competition
recommendations.overview: Two minions working in a bomb lab get competitive.

recommendations.title: Underground

recommendations.title: Orientation Day
recommendations.overview: The Minions embark on their first day of work, eager to prove themselves in their new roles. After watching a hilariously outdated 'Initiation Video,' three rookie Minions take on bomb-carrying duty. Predictably, their enthusiasm quickly spirals into

recommendations.title: Training Wheels
recommendations.overview: When Margo, Edith, and Agnes chase after an ice cream truck, little Agnes struggles to keep up and takes a tumble while pedaling her bike. Seeing her disappointment, the Minions spring into action to lift her spirits. Using their quirky ingenuity, th

recommendations.title: Minions
recommendations.overview: Minions Stuart, Kevin and Bob are recruited by Scarlet Overkill, a super-villain who, alongside her inventor husband Herb, hatches a plot to take over the world.
